  1. de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation
  2. TextualJMLConstruct

Uses of Class
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation.TextualJMLConstruct

Packages that use TextualJMLConstruct
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml
This package provides the functionalities of parsing JML comments into KeY constructs.

  • Uses of TextualJMLConstruct in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation

    Subclasses of TextualJMLConstruct in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TextualJMLAssertStatement
    A JML assert/assume statement.
    final class 
    TextualJMLClassAxiom
    A JML axiom declaration in textual form.
    final class 
    TextualJMLClassInv
    A JML class invariant declaration in textual form.
    final class 
    TextualJMLDepends
    A JML depends / accessible clause for a model field in textual form.
    final class 
    TextualJMLFieldDecl
    A JML field declaration (ghost or model) in textual form.
    final class 
    TextualJMLInitially
    A JML initially clause declaration in textual form.
    final class 
    TextualJMLLoopSpec
    A JML loop specification (invariant, assignable clause, decreases clause, ...) in textual form.
    final class 
    TextualJMLMergePointDecl
    A JML merge point declaration in textual form.
    final class 
    TextualJMLMethodDecl
    A JML model method declaration in textual form.
    final class 
    TextualJMLRepresents
    A JML represents clause in textual form.
    final class 
    TextualJMLSetStatement
    A JML set statement in textual form.
    final class 
    TextualJMLSpecCase
    A JML specification case (i.e., more or less an operation contract) in textual form.

  • Uses of TextualJMLConstruct in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml that return types with arguments of type TextualJMLConstruct
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ImmutableList<TextualJMLConstruct>
    PreParser.parseClassLevel(JmlLexer lexer)
    Parses a JML constructs on class level, e.g., invariants and methods contracts, and returns a parse tree.
    ImmutableList<TextualJMLConstruct>
    PreParser.parseClassLevel(String content)
    Parses a JML constructs on class level, e.g., invariants and methods contracts, and returns a parse tree.
    ImmutableList<TextualJMLConstruct>
    PreParser.parseClassLevel(String concatenatedComment, @Nullable URI fileName, Position pos)
    Parse and interpret class level comments.
    ImmutableList<TextualJMLConstruct>
    PreParser.parseMethodLevel(PositionedString positionedString)
    Parses a JML constructs which occurs inside methods (mostly JML statements) and returns a parse tree.
    ImmutableList<TextualJMLConstruct>
    PreParser.parseMethodLevel(String concatenatedComment, @Nullable URI fileName, Position position)
    Parse and interpret the given string as a method level construct.
